originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Debugging Observation Indexing Bug and Optimizing Perf in Xander's Environment
summary: Debugged a performance regression and memory initialization bug in C observation computation for a trash pickup environment. Resolved by flipping loops and fixing an uninitialized `total_num_obs` variable, achieving 0% M time and training in 20 seconds.
